title: Immunohistochemistry for Fetuin-A Detection in Human Autopsy Tissue
author: Miriam Heinen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sydefs6
materials: secondary antibody DAKO REAL Link (APAAP Kit)

steps.title: Place slides in hybridization oven
steps.instruction: Place slides in hybridization oven: 37°C overnight, then 1 hour at 65°C

steps.title: Deparaffination in xylene 3x20 minutes (3...
steps.instruction: Deparaffination in xylene 3x20 minutes (3 different containers) on a shaker

steps.title: Rehydration in graded ethanol
steps.instruction: Rehydration in graded ethanol: 3x2 minutes in 100% ethanol, followed by 2x2 minutes in 96% ethanol and at last 2 minutes in 70% ethanol

steps.title: Wash in phosphate buffered saline (PBS) for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in phosphate buffered saline (PBS) for 5 minutes

steps.title: Antigen retrieval in citrate buffer (10...
steps.instruction: Antigen retrieval in citrate buffer (10 mM) in a heat steamer for 30 minutes. Afterwards let the slides cool down in phosphate buffered saline for 30 minutes

steps.title: Wash slides in PBS for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash slides in PBS for 5 minutes

steps.title: Encircle each tissue section with a wax pen
steps.instruction: Encircle each tissue section with a wax pen

steps.title: Apply the primary antibody in 1%...
steps.instruction: Apply the primary antibody in 1% dilution of Bovine serum albumin (BSA) in PBS, 100 µl per section (negative controls: only 1% dilution), incubation overnight in a moisture chamber

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes

steps.title: Apply the secondary antibody DAKO REAL...
steps.instruction: Apply the secondary antibody DAKO REAL Link (APAAP Kit, bottle A) 100 µl per section, incubation for 30 minutes in a moisture chamber

steps.title: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes

steps.title: Apply Dako REAL APAAP Immunocomplex (APAAP...
steps.instruction: Apply Dako REAL APAAP Immunocomplex (APAAP Kit, bottle B), 100 µl per section, incubation for 30 minutes in a moisture chamber

steps.title: Tip off solution and rinse in demineralized water
steps.instruction: Tip off solution and rinse in demineralized water

steps.title: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS for 2x5 minutes

steps.title: Prepare the substrate working solution (CHROME)
steps.instruction: Prepare the substrate working solution (CHROME): To each 750 µl of AP Substrate Buffer (APAAP Kit , bottle F) add 30 µl chromogen Red 1 (APAAP Kit, bottle C), 30 µl chromogen Red 2 (APAAP Kit, bottle D) and 30 µl chromogen Red 3 (APAAP Kit, bottle D) in this exact order. Mix well and use within 20 minutes!

steps.title: Apply substrate working solution (CHROME), 200...
steps.instruction: Apply substrate working solution (CHROME), 200 µl per section, incubation for 20 minutes

steps.title: Wash in demineralized water for 2x5 minutes
steps.instruction: Wash in demineralized water for 2x5 minutes

steps.title: Submerge slides in Mayer´s hematoxylin for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Submerge slides in Mayer´s hematoxylin for 1 minute

steps.title: Rinse in demineralized running water for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Rinse in demineralized running water for 5 minutes

steps.title: Dehydrate in graded ethanol
steps.instruction: Dehydrate in graded ethanol: 1 minute in 70% ethanol, following 1 minute in 96% ethanol and 2 minutes in 100% ethanol

steps.title: Place the tissue samples in xylene for 3x1 minute
steps.instruction: Place the tissue samples in xylene for 3x1 minute

steps.title: Coverslip using mounting medium
steps.instruction: Coverslip using mounting medium

steps.title: See Guidelines
steps.instruction: See Guidelines
